position_note: Visual heatmap only. Tactical position is intentionally not estimated here; use Position_Arbitrator output.

visual_summary.note: Visual/action-density summary only. Do not use this as a tactical position estimate; use Position_Arbitrator output for position.

heatmap.note: Aggregated from /event/{event_id}/player/{player_id}/heatmap, weighted by match minutes when available.
